dailyOutages.plant: Full load interruption
dailyOutages.reason:
due to 132kV blue phase CT burst of Saidpur 132/11kV T1 transformer of Saidpur 20MW P/S, at the same time Rangpur-Taraganj 132kV ckt-1&2 & Barapukuria-Saidpur 132kV ckt-1&2 tripped from Saidpur end.

Maintenance work will be done by Saidpur 20MW P/S team.
dailyOutages.full_desc:
Full load interruption is occurring under Saidpur, Jaldhaka, Purbosadipur, Thakurgaon, Taraganj & Panchagarh 132/33kV SS from 18:21hr due to 132kV blue phase CT burst of Saidpur 132/11kV T1 transformer of Saidpur 20MW P/S, at the same time Rangpur-Taraganj 132kV ckt-1&2 & Barapukuria-Saidpur 132kV ckt-1&2 tripped from Saidpur end.

Maintenance work will be done by Saidpur 20MW P/S team.
